divisions.title: Samuel
divisions.summary: Hannah’s prayer, the call in the night, and the ark among the Philistines.

divisions.title: Give Us a King
divisions.summary: Israel demands a king like the nations; Saul is chosen and crowned.

divisions.title: Saul’s Rise and Fall
divisions.summary: Saul’s impatience and half-obedience cost him the kingdom.

divisions.title: David & Goliath
divisions.summary: Samuel anoints the shepherd boy; a sling fells the giant.

divisions.title: David on the Run
divisions.summary: Jonathan’s friendship, Saul’s spears, and David sparing the king’s life — twice.

divisions.title: The Death of Saul
divisions.summary: The medium at Endor, the battle at Gilboa, and Saul’s fall.
